# dnacenter_event_email_config_create (Data Source)

It performs create operation on Event Management.

- Create Email Destination

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "dnacevent_email_config_create" "example" {
  provider        = dnac
  email_config_id = "string"
  from_email      = "string"
  item {

    # status_uri = ------
  }
  primary_smt_p_config {

    host_name = "string"
    password  = "******"
    port      = "string"
    user_name = "string"
  }
  secondary_smt_p_config {

    host_name = "string"
    password  = "******"
    port      = "string"
    user_name = "string"
  }
  subject  = "string"
  to_email = "string"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- **email_config_id** (String) Required only for update email configuration
- **from_email** (String) From Email
- **id** (String) The ID of this resource.
- **primary_smt_p_config** (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--primary_smt_p_config))
- **secondary_smt_p_config** (Block List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--secondary_smt_p_config))
- **subject** (String) Subject
- **to_email** (String) To Email

### Read-Only

- **item** (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--item))

<a id="nestedblock--primary_smt_p_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `primary_smt_p_config`

Optional:

- **host_name** (String) Host Name
- **password** (String, Sensitive) Password
- **port** (String) Port
- **user_name** (String) User Name


<a id="nestedblock--secondary_smt_p_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `secondary_smt_p_config`

Optional:

- **host_name** (String) Host Name
- **password** (String, Sensitive) Password
- **port** (String) Port
- **user_name** (String) User Name


<a id="nestedatt--item"></a>
### Nested Schema for `item`

Read-Only:

- **status_uri** (String)
